subject: feat(theme): add cross-tab sync and dynamic meta theme-color to useDarkMode hook
body:
Adds storage event listener for cross-tab theme synchronization and
dynamic meta theme-color update for Android Chrome address bar sync
on manual toggles. Also documents debug pill theme detection pattern,
clarifies ui.* semantic tokens eliminating dark: prefixes, and adds
Key Lessons 14-16.

Tags: documentation, theme, dark-mode, cross-tab-sync
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: minor

title: add cross-tab sync and dynamic meta theme-color to useDarkMode hook
